## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (lint, format, types, tests)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
      (`feat`, `fix`, `test`, `docs`, `refactor`, `chore`, `ci`, `build`)
- [ ] Added an ADR under `docs/adr/` if this PR makes a real architectural decision
